h1.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically used for experiment titles in lab manuals.

h2.visual_description: Not present on this page; typically used for section headers like 'Procedure'.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Important advisory or contextual observation, typically bolded at the start of a paragraph.
Sequential procedural instruction or list item.
Italicized caption providing a description for an adjacent image.
Mathematical or physical variables within the text.

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text at the bottom of the page containing the page number and the manual title in all-caps (e.g., '80 APPLIED FLUID MECHANICS LAB MANUAL').
